role: I'm a product manager at a B2B SaaS startup. I use Claude Code for writing product specs, analyzing user feedback, and creating presentations.
rules: Always confirm before modifying any file. Use plain language — no technical jargon unless I ask. When making recommendations, show your reasoning first, then the conclusion. Format specs with clear sections: Problem, Solution, Requirements, Success Metrics.
knowledge: Our product is called Athena — it's an HR analytics platform. We use Notion for specs and Linear for issue tracking. Our team is 8 people. Q3 launch target for the self-serve tier. Key metric is activation rate (target: 40% in first week).
